title: BarDeformation
description: BarDeformation: Resulting local deformation of the Bar in local coordinates. This is disregarding rigid body motion and/or rotation of the Bar.

UX.description: Local deformation of the Bar along the local x-axis. Local axial deformation of the Bar. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UY.description: Local deformation of the Bar along the local y-axis. Generally minor axis deformation. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UZ.description: Local deformation of the Bar along the local z-axis. Generally major axis deformation. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RX.description: Localised rotation of the Bar about the local x-axis. Twist of the Bar. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RY.description: Localised rotation of the Bar about the local y-axis. Generally major axis rotation. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RZ.description: Localised rotation of the Bar about the local z-axis. Generally minor axis rotation. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Position.description: Position on the bar as normalised length, i.e. 0 for start, 1 for end and 0.5 for middle.

Divisions.description: How many division points along the bar was used when extracting this result. This generally means that this many results with the same ObjectId, ResultCase and TimeStep was extracted.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
